title: Marketplace Listing
description: A machine-readable marketplace listing record for publishing, licensing, discovering, and monetizing origin assets, derivative assets, and related structural products in the Origin Structure Market.

id.description: A unique identifier for the marketplace listing.

title.description: Human-readable title of the marketplace listing.

listed_asset.description: Asset being listed on the marketplace.

version.description: Optional version of the listed asset.

canonical_hash.description: Optional hash of the canonical listed asset.

summary.description: Short marketplace-facing summary of the listing.

description.description: Longer description of the listing, use cases, and buyer value.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the marketplace listing was created.

version.description: Version of this marketplace listing record.

status.description: Current marketplace status of the listing.

pricing.description: Pricing and commercial access model for the listing.

currency.description: Currency used for the listing price.

revenue_share_rate.description: Revenue share rate requested from downstream commercial use, if applicable.

license.description: License and usage terms for the marketplace listing.

license_name.description: Name of the license or usage agreement.

license_url.description: Optional URL to the license text.

ai_training_allowed.description: Whether the listed asset may be used for AI training.

ai_inference_allowed.description: Whether the listed asset may be used during AI inference or agent workflows.

redistribution_allowed.description: Whether redistribution of the listed asset is allowed.

royalty.description: Royalty and allocation references associated with the listing.

royalty_required.description: Whether downstream use requires royalty allocation.

royalty_allocation_graph_id.description: Optional Royalty Allocation Graph associated with this listing.

default_origin_rate.description: Default royalty rate reserved for origin creators, if applicable.

default_derivative_rate.description: Default royalty rate reserved for derivative creators, if applicable.

protocol_fund_rate.description: Default royalty rate reserved for protocol maintenance or commons funding.

discovery.description: Search, categorization, and discovery metadata for the listing.

language.description: Primary language of the listed asset.

target_users.description: Intended users or buyers of the listing.

quality_signals.description: Optional quality and trust signals for the marketplace listing.

origin_audit_record_ids.description: Origin Audit Records associated with this listing.

validation_status.description: Validation status of the listed asset.

human_review.description: Human review boundary for the marketplace listing.

required.description: Whether human review is required before the listing becomes active.

reviewed_at.description: Optional timestamp when human review occurred.

trace.description: Trace links for the marketplace listing.

source_url.description: Primary URL or repository location of the listing.

related_assets.description: Related assets, audits, allocation graphs, protocols, repositories, or standards.

evidence_hashes.description: Hashes of supporting records, listing snapshots, license files, or marketplace artifacts.
